name: triad-territory-rush-server
description: Stable low-latency classroom gateway with coalesced state frames, cumulative territory deltas, heartbeat recovery, bounded projectiles and flexible one-to-nine-player matches.

scripts.test: node --check runtime-patch.js && node --check runtime-v6.js && node --check runtime-v7.js && node --check runtime-v8.js && node --check runtime-v9.js && node --check runtime-v10.js && node --check runtime-v11.js && node --check secure-gateway.js && node --check server-v3.js
